import {React, useEffect, useState} from 'react' import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import axios from 'axios' export default function Category() { const {id} = useParams() const [category, setCategory] = useState([]) const [categoryProduct, setCategoryProduct] = useState([]) const [isCategoryId, setCategoryId] = useState('') useEffect(() => { if(id){ getIdData(id) getCategoryIdData(id) } }, [id]) const getIdData = async(id) => { const res = await axios.get(`http://localhost:1700/backend/category/${id}`) setCategory(res.data) setCategoryId(res.data.category_id) console.log(isCategoryId) // console.log('res:', res.data) } const getCategoryIdData = async(id) => { id = category.category_id console.log() const categoryRes = await axios.get(`http://localhost:1700/backend/product/category/${id}`) setCategoryProduct(categoryRes.data) // console.log(categoryRes.data) } return (
{category.category_name} 15 items
Projector From ₹6990 Mobile Cables From ₹499 Apple iPhone 17 From ₹82,900 Monitors From ₹6599 Top Mirrorless Camera Shop Now! Fastrack Smartwatch From ₹1,399 Wireless Headphones Grab Now Printers From ₹2336 Wireless Headphones Grab Now Printers From ₹2336
) }
